subtasks.description: Fetch Adobe license inventory, entitlements, and contract metadata from MongoDB
Query Snowflake for Adobe Q4 usage metrics, spend, and consumption data
Reconcile MongoDB license state with Snowflake Q4 usage; identify variances, overages, and underutilization; generate reconciliation summary
Post reconciliation summary to #sam-team Slack channel

plan.cost_rationale: 4 subtasks total (minimum needed): Mongo and SQL queries are parallel, simple field retrieval from known schemas (small tier). Cross-recon reconciles two sources and generates the summary (mid tier—requires variance detection and posture analysis). Slack post is a simple tool call (small tier, multitool_plan for registry integration). Total planned tool calls: 2 (fetch) + 1 (reconcile) + 1 (post) + 2 remaining budget = fits within 6-call budget. Dependencies structured: fetches run in parallel, reconciliation depends on both, Slack post depends on reconciliation output.

output.sql: SELECT publisher, product, fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter, SUM(amount_usd) AS total_spend, SUM(daily_active_seats) AS total_active_seats, COUNT(DISTINCT user_id) AS unique_users, COUNT(*) AS event_count FROM consumption_facts WHERE publisher = 'Adobe' AND fiscal_year = 2024 AND fiscal_quarter = 4 AND event_date >= '2024-10-01' AND event_date < '2025-01-01' GROUP BY publisher, product, fiscal_year, fiscal_quarter ORDER BY total_spend DESC

arguments.message:
📊 **License Reconciliation Summary - Q4 2024**

**Adobe Creative Cloud** (LIC-ADOBE-CC-001)
• Status: ✅ Stable
• Allocated Seats: 150 | Active: 138 | Utilization: 92%
• Spend: $112.5K of $450K committed (25% of Q4 allocation)
• Variance: 12 seats allocated but inactive

**Adobe Experience Cloud** (LIC-ADOBE-EC-002)
• Status: ⚠️ Hold
• Allocated Seats: 85 | Active: 72 | Utilization: 85%
• Spend: $95.2K of $280K committed (34% of Q4 allocation)
• Variance: 13 seats allocated but inactive | Underutilization Alert

**Adobe Document Cloud** (LIC-ADOBE-DC-003)
• Status: Enterprise Contract
• Allocated Seats: 200 | Assigned: 198
• Contract Renewal: 2025-02-28
• Committed Spend: $320K

✨ All Adobe licenses reconciled across Mongo and Snowflake data sources.
